maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of tools to return across all sources.

minRating.title: Minimum Rating
minRating.description: Only include tools with an average rating at or above this value (0–5).

salesTasks.title: Sales Tasks Filter
salesTasks.description: Only return tools that cover at least one of these sales tasks. Leave empty to return all.

pricingModel.title: Pricing Model
pricingModel.description: Filter by pricing model. Choose 'all' to skip filtering.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Which directories to scrape. Remove a source to skip it.
